001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003/**
004 * Data transfer object containing viability statistics for a batch.
005 */
006public class BatchViabilitySummary {
007
008  private final int viableCount;
009  private final int totalCount;
010
011  /**
012   * Constructs a BatchViabilitySummary with viability counts.
013   *
014   * @param viableCount the count of viable eggs
015   * @param totalCount the total count of eggs
016   */
017  public BatchViabilitySummary(int viableCount, int totalCount) {
018    this.viableCount = viableCount;
019    this.totalCount = totalCount;
020  }
021
022  /**
023   * Gets the count of viable eggs.
024   *
025   * @return the viable egg count
026   */
027  public int getViableCount() {
028    return viableCount;
029  }
030
031  /**
032   * Gets the total count of eggs.
033   *
034   * @return the total egg count
035   */
036  public int getTotalCount() {
037    return totalCount;
038  }
039
040  /**
041   * Gets the calculated viability rate.
042   *
043   * @return the viability rate as a decimal (0.0 to 1.0), or 0.0 if total is zero
044   */
045  public double getViableRate() {
046    return (totalCount > 0) ? ((double) viableCount / totalCount) : 0.0;
047  }
048
049}
